data.body:
## Context
The v2 ticket system (.tickets/ flat markdown files, tk CLI wrapper, .index.json index) was replaced by the v3 event-sourced system (.tickets-tracker/ orphan branch, ticket CLI) several releases ago. Approximately 259 stale references remain across 51 files — in hooks, scripts, skills, docs, and tests — creating confusion for agents and developers who encounter v2 patterns alongside v3 instructions. No consumers depend on v2 compatibility, so all references can be cleanly removed.

## Success Criteria
1. All existing v2 RED tests pass (test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh, test-v2-clean-guard.sh, test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh, test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh, test-review-stop-check.sh v2 test)
2. No .tickets/ path references remain in hooks, scripts, or skills (excluding .tickets-tracker/ which is v3)
3. No bare tk CLI references remain in CLAUDE.md or skill files (the ticket CLI is the sole interface)
4. Historical migration docs (docs/designs/adr-ticket-v3-event-sourced-storage.md, docs/ticket-migraiton-v3/) are removed
5. Legacy v2-only scripts (orphaned-tasks.sh, restore-ticket-bodies.sh) are removed
6. validate.sh --ci passes after all changes

## Dependencies
Story 4506-e5da — relates_to; this epic subsumes the remaining hook passthrough removal work

## Approach
Single sweep organized by file category: hooks/scripts first (functional), then skills/prompts (agent instructions), then CLAUDE.md, then docs, then test hygiene. Existing RED tests provide verification at each stage. Guards referencing .tickets/ are either removed (if v2-only) or updated to .tickets-tracker/ (if the guard logic is still needed for v3).
